body:
## Severity: LOW

## Game Affected
Skyrim SE DLC content (Meshes1.bsa) — 6 + 1 hits in the 2026-04-26 sweep.

## Description

Source: AUDIT_NIF_2026-04-28.md (NIF-D5-NEW-01).

Two Havok types from Skyrim SE DLC content currently fall through to the `NiUnknown` catch-all in `crates/nif/src/blocks/mod.rs`:

- **`bhkBallSocketConstraintChain`** (6 hits in `Skyrim - Meshes1.bsa`) — rope/chain-link constraint used on Skyrim DLC physics chandeliers and dragon-pit chains.
- **`bhkPlaneShape`** (1 hit in `Skyrim - Meshes1.bsa`) — infinite plane (used as kinematic floor).

Both are post-FO3 Havok blocks that nif.xml flags `versions=#FO3_AND_LATER#`. Block-size recovery handles them today (FO3+ has `block_sizes` table); however, if a mod were to ship them on a v20.0.0.5 NIF (pre-FO3 Oblivion bytestream), parse would cascade because Oblivion has no block-size recovery.

## Catastrophic on Oblivion?

Unknown — neither appears in the Oblivion vanilla corpus. Filing pre-emptively because stub parsers should land before any Oblivion mod compatibility work.

## Suggested Fix

Stub each as a NiObject with `block_size`-driven trailing-byte skip. ~20 LOC each.

```rust
// blocks/collision.rs (sketch)
pub struct BhkPlaneShape { /* TODO: layout from nif.xml */ }
impl BhkPlaneShape {
    pub fn parse(stream: &mut NifStream, block_size: Option<u32>) -> io::Result<Self> {
        // Read what nif.xml describes; skip the rest via block_size.
        // ...
    }
}
```

Reference layouts from nif.xml at `/mnt/data/src/reference/nifxml/nif.xml`.

## Volume

7 blocks in Skyrim SE Meshes1.bsa (2026-04-26 sweep). Negligible by occurrence; closing this gets Skyrim SE Meshes1 to 100% clean parse.

## Related

- Audit: docs/audits/AUDIT_NIF_2026-04-28.md (NIF-D5-NEW-01)
- Prior 2026-04-26 dim_5 #11 — was carried forward but not converted to issue at the time

## Completeness Checks

- [ ] **UNSAFE**: N/A
- [ ] **SIBLING**: Other Havok long-tail types in the same archive (re-run `d5_unk_ba2 Skyrim - Meshes1.bsa` to confirm only these two)
- [ ] **DROP**: N/A
- [ ] **LOCK_ORDER**: N/A
- [ ] **FFI**: N/A
- [ ] **TESTS**: Per-type byte-exact dispatch test with a captured fixture, plus a Skyrim SE Meshes1 integration sweep that pins the post-fix unknown count to 0
title: NIF-D5-NEW-01: SE Meshes1 Havok long-tail (bhkBallSocketConstraintChain, bhkPlaneShape) undispatched
